the reviewer expresses disappointment because the book title misled them into thinking it was about a deer story like bambi. they clarify that the actual content focuses on a young adult named bambina, which is not what they expected to read.

despite the confusion, the user gives a five star rating to avoid unfairly judging the work since they have not finished reading it. this action suggests a neutral or slightly positive stance toward the book itself, even though the initial experience was frustrating due to the misleading title.
